title: Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, 2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
doc_html:
SECTION 10--OF THE APPOINTMENT, RECOGNITION, OR

CONFIRMATION OF TUTORS, OF THE PERSONS WHOSE DUTY

IT IS TO CAUSE TUTORS TO BE APPOINTED AND OF THE

LIABILITY OF SUCH PERSONS

Art. 307.  Repealed by Acts 1960, No. 30, §2, eff. Jan. 1, 1961.
